card.name: Absence Elemental
card.text: When this creature enters, target nonland permanent an opponent controls phases out until this creature leaves the battlefield. (Treat it and anything attached to it as though they don't exist until its controller's next turn.)

card.name: Begin the Masquerade
card.text: Exile all creatures. Each player shuffles all creatures they own that were exiled this way into a face-down pile, then manifests them.

card.name: Down the Rabbit Hole
card.text: Each creature card in your hand has minimize. The minimize cost is equal to its mana cost reduced by {2}. (If you it for its minimize cost, it has base power and toughness 1/1.)

card.name: Gods' Ire
card.text: Destroy all permanents with mana value 4 or greater.

card.name: Soul Sisters
card.text: Multiple 2 (When this enters, if it's not a token, create a token copies.) Whenever another creature you control not named Soul Sisters enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: Sourdough Soldier
card.text: Whenever you sacrifice this creature or another Food, target creature you control gets +2/+0 until end of turn. {2}, {T}, Sacrifice this creature: You gain 3 life.

card.name: Synthetic Life
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, choose one — • Conjure a card named Homunculus Prototype into your hand. • Homunculus cards in your hand perpetually get +1/+1.

card.name: Tyrant of the Meadows
card.text: Flying Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Vanishing Point
card.text: Flash Perspective — This spell costs {2} less to cast if you've looked at or revealed a card in your library this turn. When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls until this enchantment leaves the battlefield.

card.name: Wrath of the Dragon Queen
card.text: Each player who controls a creature with flying draws a card. Then destroy all creatures.

card.name: Welcoming Entrance // Living Room
card.text:
Whenever a creature you control enters and whenever a permanent you control becomes a creature, you gain 1 life.
---
When you unlock this door, this Room becomes a 3/4 creature with lifelink in addition to its other types.

card.name: Behold the New Worlds
card.text: You may behold a Plains, an Island, a Swamp, a Mountain, and/or a Forest. Draw a card for each card or permanent that was beheld.

card.name: Case of the Living Mystery
card.text: Vigilance Whenever this Case attacks, investigate. (Create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.") To Solve — You control five or more Clues. (If unsolved, solve at the beginning of your end step.) Clue tokens you control are 1/1 Dective creatures in addition to their other types.

card.name: Circle of Transmutation
card.text: {2}{U}, Discard a card: Seek a card with the same mana value as the discarded card. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Civilianize
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature is a 1/1 Citizen in addition to its other types and has defender. It loses all other abilities.

card.name: Cloning Vat
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, conjure a card named Clone into your hand. (It's a {3}{U} 0/0 Shapeshifter with "You may have this creature enter as a copy of any creature on the battlefield.")

card.name: Don't Be Ridiculous!
card.text: Counter target Un-spell. (An un-spell is a silver-bordered or acorn spell.)

card.name: Envision
card.text: Perspective — Draw two cards. If you've looked at or revealed a card in your library this turn, draw three cards instead.

card.name: Fall Upwards
card.text: Up to three target creatures gain flying until end of turn. --- (Back): Crossroad Cascades

card.name: Crossroad Cascades
card.text: As this land enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {U}. --- (Front): Fall Upwards

card.name: The Man With Many Masks
card.text: Morph {X}{U} As this creature is turned face up, you may have it become a copy of a creature on the battlefield of a creature card in a graveyard with mana value X or less.

card.name: New Worlds Dragon Rider
card.text: As long as you control a Dragon, this creature has flying.

card.name: Run on Thin Air
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature has flying and rubberhose. (If damage would be dealt to this creature, prevent that damage and return it to your hand.) When enchanted creature is put into its owner's hand from the battlefield, return this Aura to its owner's hand

card.name: Saura Pemmin, Morphomancer
card.text: {U}, {T}: Untap target creature. {U}, {T}: Target creature gains flying until end of turn. {U}, {T}: Target creature gains shroud until end of turn. {1}, {T}: Target creature gets +1/-1 or -1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: Subvert Axioms
card.text: Shift Frameworks. (Look at the top card of your Framework deck, then put it back on top, on the bottom, or onto the battlefield.) Draw a card.

card.name: Tyrant of the Lakes
card.text: Flying Islandcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Void Rabbit
card.text: Soulbond (You may pair this creature with another unpaired creature when either enters. They remain paired for as long as you control both of them.) This creature and creatures paired with it can't be blocked.

card.name: Death Elemental
card.text: Deathtouch Death Elemental can't attack unless an opponent lost life this turn.

card.name: Evolved Manhunter
card.text: Whenever another creature dies, if it had flying, this creature perpetually gains flying. The same is true for first strike, double strike, deathtouch, haste, hexproof, indestructible, lifelink, menace, reach, trample, and vigilance.

card.name: Lord Maxwell
card.text: Whenever a nontoken creature dies, put a level counter on Lord Maxwell. [1/1] [level 3+] Deathtouch [4/4] [level 6+] Indestructible [7/7]

card.name: The Nameless Rider
card.text: Menace, deathtouch Whenever The Nameless Rider deals combat damage to a player, if that player has the Rider's Mark, that player loses the game. Otherwise, that player gets the Rider's Mark.

card.name: Nilpotence
card.text: Each of X target creatures have base power and toughness 0/0 until end of turn.

card.name: Pincing —
card.text: Augment {2}{B} ({2}{B}, Reveal this card from your hand: Combine it with target host. Augment only as a sorcery.) Menace Whenever this creature becomes blocked, — --- (Back): Predatory — Stinger

card.name: Predatory — Stinger
card.text: When this creature enters — Each opponent loses 2 life and you gain 2 life. Deathtouch --- (Front): Pincing —

card.name: Samael, the Reaper
card.text: If a creature dealt damage by Samael this turn would die, exile it with a victim counter on it instead. Power Absorption — {0}: Choose a creature card in exile with a victim counter on it. Samael gains all abilities of that card until the next time this ability resolves.

card.name: Squash Underfoot
card.text: Creatures your opponents control get -1/-1 until end of turn. You lose 2 life.

card.name: Tyrant of the Moors
card.text: Flying Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Unnatural Roar
card.text: Target creature gets +1/+1 and menace and deathtouch until end of turn. --- (Back): Screaming Hills

card.name: Screaming Hills
card.text: As this land enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {B}. --- (Front): Unnatural Roar

card.name: R, rrr Rrrrrrrr
card.text: Rrrrrrrr rrrrrrrrr rrr rrrrrrr rrr +R/+R. Rr r rrrrrr rrr rrrrrrr rrrrr rrrr rrrrrrrrr rrrrrr rr rr rrrrrrrr, rr rrrrr rrrr rrrr rrrrrr rrrr R rrrrrrr.

card.name: R, the Gunsmith
card.text: Equipped creatures you control get +2/+0. If a source you control would deal noncombat damage to an opponent, it deals that much damage plus 2 instead.

card.name: Dragon's Soul
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature is a Dragon in addition to its other types and has flying and "{R}: This creature gets +1/+0 until end of turn."

card.name: Puck, Fae Harlequin
card.text: Flash When Puck enters, you may choose new targets for target spell or ability. {U}, Discard a card: Return Puck to his owner's hand.

card.name: Tyrant of the Cliffs
card.text: Flying Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Collector of Lost Things
card.text: {T}: Mill a card. Create a Food token if it was a creature card, a Treasure token if it was a land card, and a Clue token if it was a noncreature, nonland card. Sacrifice a Clue, a Food, and a Treasure: Return target card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: Commune with Dragons
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a Dragon or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in any order.

card.name: Dragon Migration
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, you may behold a Dragon. (To behold a Dragon, choose a Dragon you control or reveal a Dragon card from your hand.) Search your library for a basic land card. If a Dragon was beheld, instead search your library for any land card. Put that card onto the battlefield, then shuffle.

card.name: Go Feral
card.text: Target creature gets +5/+5 and loses all abilities until end of turn.

card.name: Grasping —
card.text: Augment {2}{G} ({2}{G}, Reveal this card from your hand: Combine it with target host. Augment only as a sorcery.) Reach Whenever this creature blocks, — --- (Back): Grip — Vines

card.name: Grip — Vines
card.text: When this creature enters — Put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Reach --- (Front): Grasping —

card.name: Living Equation
card.text: Trample Solve for X — Whenever you pay a cost that contains {X}, this creature gets +X/+X until end of turn.

card.name: Paradoxical Architecture
card.text: Whenever you draw your second card each turn, you may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Raiz, Curious Cultivator
card.text: Raiz gets +1/+1 for each kind of counter among yourself and permanents you control. {T}: Add X mana in any combination of colors, where X is Raiz's power. {W}{U}{B}{R}{G}: Proliferate.

card.name: Tower over Trees
card.text: Target creature gets +4/+4 and gains reach and trample until end of turn. --- (Back): Jungle of Giants

card.name: Jungle of Giants
card.text: As this land enters, you may pay 3 life. If you don't, it enters tapped. {T}: Add {G}. --- (Front): Tower over Trees

card.name: Tyrant of the Woods
card.text: Flying Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: Volundr, Seeker of Mt. King
card.text: Whenever Volundr enters or attacks, choose one — • Draw a card from your atlas deck. • Volundr explores.

card.name: The World Tree Sprouts
card.text: For each basic land type, search your library for a card of that type and put it onto the battlefield tapped. Then shuffle.

card.name: Astra F., Pata-Stronomer
card.text: Starfall — Whenever a nontoken permanent you control enters, if the night sky is visible in its art, create a 1/1 white and blue Star enchantment creature token with flying.

card.name: Dragon Flock Leader
card.text: Flying, vigilance Other creatures you control with flying get +1/+1 and have vigilance.

card.name: Rubber Annie, Ringmaster
card.text: Rubberhose (If damage would be dealt to this creature, prevent that damage and return it to your hand.) When Rubber Annie enters, you may put a creature card from your hand onto the battlefield. It gains rubberhose. (If damage would be dealt to this creature, prevent that damage and return it to your hand.)

card.name: Jenny Everywhere
card.text: The "legend rule" doesn't apply to Jenny Everywhere. Other legendary creatures you control get +1/+1. A deck can have any number of cards named Jenny Everywhere.

card.name: Edwin Odd Edd Odwin
card.text: Flying, lifelink Rubberhose (If damage would be dealt to this creature, prevent that damage and return it to your hand.) When Edwin "Odd Edd" Odwin enters, return target creature card from your graveyard to the battlefield with a finalirt counter on it. You lose life equal to that creature's mana value.

card.name: Jenny Nowhere
card.text: The "legend rule" doesn't apply to Jenny Nowhere. Nonlegendary creatures get -1/-1. A deck can have any number of cards named Jenny Nowhere.

card.name: Frostfire Weird
card.text: When this creature enters, tap target creature an opponent controls and put a stun counter on it. When this creature dies, it deals 3 damage to target player. Evoke {3}{U}{R} (You may cast this spell for its evoke cost. If you do, it's sacrificed when it enters.)

card.name: Game Knight
card.text: If you would roll one or more dice, instead roll that many dice plus one and ignore one of those results. {2}{U}{R}: Roll a six-sided die. Game Knight gets +X/+X until end of turn, where X is the result. Activate only once each turn.

card.name: Marauder's Dragonship
card.text: Flying When this Vehicle enters, create two 1/1 blue and red Pirate creature tokens. Crew 2

card.name: Sunfire Dragon
card.text: Flying, lifelink Whenever you cycle another card, this creature deals 2 damage to each opponent. Cycling {R}{W} ({R}{W}, Discard this card: Draw a card.) When you cycle this card, it deals 2 damage to any target.

card.name: Mask of Illusions
Wisdom of the Woods
card.text: Draw two cards. You may play an additional land this turn. --- (Back): Forest of Knowledge

card.name: Forest of Knowledge
card.text: This land enters tapped. {T}: Add {G} or {U}. --- (Front): Wisdom of the Woods

card.name: Adalinda, Dragonspeaker
card.text: Flying Dragon spells you cast cost {1} less to cast. Whenever you cast a Dragon spell, draw a card.

card.name: Ariel Vivelia
card.text: If a spell or ability you control would counter a spell, exile that spell instead. You may cast it for as long as it remains exiled, and mana of any type can be spent to cast it. Whenever you cast a spell you don't own, create a Treasure token.

card.name: Castor and Pollux Dioscuri
card.text: Multiple 2 (When this enters, if it's not a token, create a token copies. You can have up to two that are legendary.) As long as this creature is tapped, tapped creatures you control get +1/+0. As long this creature is untapped, untapped creatures you control get +0/+1.

card.name: Devourer of Hope
card.text: This spell can't be countered. As Devourer of Hope enters, each opponent chooses odd or even. Lifelink, deathtouch Your opponents can't cast spells with mana value of the quality they didn't choose.

card.name: Madam Universe, Mayor
card.text: Each nontoken, nonland, noncreature permanent you control is an Incarnation creature in addition to its other types and has base power and toughness equal to its mana value. The same is true for noncreature permanent spells you control and noncreature, nonland permanent cards you own that aren't on the battlefield.

card.name: Magnus Arneson, Explorer
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Magnus Arneson attacks, discover X, where X is the number of lands you control. (To discover X, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland card with mana value X or less. Cast it without paying its mana cost or put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order.)

card.name: Noah, Freelance Alchemist
card.text: When Noah enters, a nonland card in your hand perpetually gains "This spell costs {1} less to cast." Whenever you cast a spell with a perpetual modifier, draw a card.

card.name: Ubu Roi
card.text: Protection from non-Un Whenever you cast an Un-spell from your hand, exile cards from the top of your library until you exile a nonland Un-card with lesser mana value. You may cast that card without paying its mana cost. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Kind Lee, Protection Witch // Marked: Protect
card.text:
Ward {1} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {1}.)
---
Target creature gains protection from the color of your choice until end of turn. (You may cast this from the battlefield. You can't cast it again until your next turn.)

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Human Warlock // Instant — Innate

card.name: Maven Brown, Raven Witch // Marked: Raven
card.text:
{U}: Until end of turn, Maven Brown, Raven Witch becomes a Bird and gains flying.
---
Create a 1/1 blue Bird creature token with flying. (You may cast this from the battlefield. You can't cast it again until your next turn.)

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Human Warlock // Sorcery — Innate

card.name: Vex Wilson, Death Witch // Marked: Kill
card.text:
Menace
---
Destroy target creature that was dealt damage this turn. (You may cast this from the battlefield. You can't cast it again until your next turn.)

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Human Warlock // Sorcery — Innate

card.name: Raye Sunlight, Flower Witch // Marked: Grow
card.text:
When Raye Sunlight enters, create a 0/1 green Plant creature token.
---
Put a +1/+1 counter on target creature. (You may cast this from the battlefield. You can't cast it again until your next turn.)

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Human Warlock // Sorcery — Innate

card.name: Moxie Brown, Mouse Witch // Marked: Mouse
card.text:
Moxie Brown, Mouse Witch can't be blocked by creatures with power 3 or greater.
---
Create a 1/1 white Mouse creature token. (You may cast this from the battlefield. You can't cast it again until your next turn.)

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Human Warlock // Sorcery — Innate

card.name: Slice of Life
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 1/1 green and white Citizen creature token and you gain 1 life. When a Citizen token you control attacks or blocks, sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: Slice of Life
card.text: At the beginning of your upkeep, create a 1/1 green and white Citizen creature token and you gain 1 life. When a Citizen token you control attacks or blocks, sacrifice this enchantment.

card.name: Pure Joyce, Helpful Witch // Marked: Help
card.text:
Lifelink
---
Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. Untap it. (You may cast this from the battlefield. You can't cast it again until your next turn.)

prop.type: Legendary Creature — Vampire Warlock // Sorcery — Innate

card.name: Henry F., Pata-Matician
card.text: As Henry F. enters, note the value of X. {T}: Choose target instant or sorcery spell you control. Exchange the value of a number or number word in that spell's text box with the noted value.

card.name: Tentacled —
card.text: Augment {2}{GU} ({2}{GU}, Reveal this card from your hand: Combine it with target host. Augment only as a sorcery.) {2}, {T}: — --- (Back): Clingy — Polypus

card.name: Clingy — Polypus
card.text: When this creature enters — You may tap or untap another target permanent. --- (Front): Tentacled —

card.name: Winged —
card.text: Augment {2}{WU} ({2}{WU}, Reveal this card from your hand: Combine it with target host. Augment only as a sorcery.) Flying Whenever this creature deals combat damage to a player, — --- (Back): Wingstorm — Raptor

card.name: Wingstorm — Raptor
card.text: When this creature enters — You may return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Flying --- (Front): Winged —

card.name: Aetheric Resonator
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {1}, {T}: You get {E}. {T}, Pay X {E}: Add X mana of any one color.

card.name: Artist's Palette
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color among permanents you control.

card.name: Memorial to Legend
card.text: Legendary creatures you control have undying.

card.name: The Philosopher's Stone
card.text: If you would conjure a card, conjure two of that card instead.

card.name: Amber City
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you lose 2 life. {T}: Add {B}, {R}, {G}, or {W}.

card.name: Amethyst City
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you lose 2 life. {T}: Add {W}, {U}, {B}, or {R}.

card.name: Basalt Ruins
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you lose 2 life. {T}: Add {U}, {B}, {R}, or {G}.

card.name: Chromatic Crossroads
card.text: This land enters tapped. As it enters, choose a color. When this land enters, return a land you control to its owner's hand. {T}: Add two mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Emerald City
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you lose 2 life. {T}: Add {R}, {G}, {W}, or {U}.

card.name: Gate Town
card.text: You may have this land enter tapped. If you do, choose a color as it enters. {T}: Add {C} or one mana of the chosen color.

card.name: Great Unknown
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Great Unknown: Seek a land card and put it onto the battlefield tapped.

card.name: Mt. Apollyon
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}, Sacrifice an artifact: Add {U}{R}.

card.name: Oddwyld Expanse
card.text: {T}: Add {C}. {T}: Add one mana of any color. Spend this mana only to cast a host creature spell or activate an augment ability.

card.name: Opal City
card.text: This land enters tapped. When this land enters, you lose 2 life. {T}: Add {G}, {W}, {U}, or {B}.

card.name: Twilight Cavern
card.text: Daybound (If a player casts no spells during their own turn, it becomes night next turn.) {T}: Add {C}. --- (Back): Twilight Grotto

card.name: Twilight Grotto
card.text: Nightbound (If a player casts at least two spells during their own turn, it becomes day next turn.) {T}: Add one mana of any color. --- (Front): Twilight Cavern

card.name: Bliss
card.text: You have no maximum hand size. Whenever you play a land or cast a spell, draw a card. Then if your have fourteen or more cards in hand, you lose the game. Discard your hand: Shift Frameworks. Activate only as a sorcery and only once each turn.

card.name: Doubt
card.text: (If you control another Framework, put it on the bottom of your Framework deck.) Noncreature spells cost {1} more to cast.

card.name: Pearl Masque
card.text: (Start the game with up to one legendary conspiracy face up in the command zone.) White is in your commanders' color identity.

card.name: Sapphire Masque
card.text: (Start the game with up to one legendary conspiracy face up in the command zone.) Blue is in your commanders' color identity.

card.name: Jet Masque
card.text: (Start the game with up to one legendary conspiracy face up in the command zone.) Black is in your commanders' color identity.

card.name: Ruby Masque
card.text: (Start the game with up to one legendary conspiracy face up in the command zone.) Red is in your commanders' color identity.

card.name: Emerald Masque
card.text: (Start the game with up to one legendary conspiracy face up in the command zone.) Green is in your commanders' color identity.

card.name: Grandmaster Clock
card.text: Whenever you crank this Contraption, put a toll counter on it. Then if there are two or more toll counters on this Contraption, remove them all and take an extra turn after this one.

card.name: Power Lines
card.text: Device artifacts you control have "{T}: Add {C}{C}. You can't spend this mana to cast non-device spells."

card.name: Impassable Forest
card.text: Creatures can't attack you unless their controller pays {2} for each creature they control that's attacking you. {T}: Add {G} or {U}.

card.name: Leyline of Frost
card.text: If this card is in your opening hand, you may begin the game with it on the battlefield. Permanents you control, spells you control, and cards you own that aren't on the battlefield are snow.

card.name: Frost Channeler
card.text: {2}: Add one mana of any color.

card.name: Explore the House
card.text: Look at the top five cards of your library. You may reveal a land or Room card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: Melody, the House Itself
card.text: When Melody enters, you may exile a nonland permanent card with mana value 3 or less embedded in her. Melody has all activated and triggered abilities of nonland permanent cards emedded in her.

card.name: Recursive Room // Outer Void
card.text:
Each nonland permanent card in your hand has embed. The embed cost is equal to its mana cost reduced by {2}.
---
When you unlock this door, you may cast any number of embedded cards you own in exile without paying their mana costs.

card.name: Snoop Around
card.text: Choose one — • Lock or unlock a door of target room you control. • Investigate twice. (To investigate, create a Clue token. It's an artifact with "{2}, Sacrifice this token: Draw a card.")

card.name: Worlds within Worlds
card.text: Embed {G} (You may pay {G} to exile this card from your hand embedded in a nonland you control. Cast it for free when that permanent leaves. Embed only as a sorcery) {G}, Sacrifice this enchantment: Search your library for up to two basic land cards, put them onto the battlefield tapped, then shuffle. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: Fold Up
card.text: When this enchantment enters, exile target nonland permanent an opponent controls. When this enchantment leaves the battlefield, the owner of the exiled card creates a token that's a copy of it.

card.name: Worldmaking
card.text: Create a token thats a copy of each of up to two target lands you control.
